code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API    
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Validate request from Orch and create Auth session 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的认证流程图，核心是Orchestration层如何引导用户完成OAuth 2.0授权。首先Orchestration会发302重定向到Authentication Frontend的authorize端点。
明白，Orchestration作为入口。那Frontend收到请求后，是直接跟外部认证服务交互，还是先内部处理？我看到有Authentication External API和Internal API两个角色。
Frontend先自己验证请求并创建认证会话，然后调用Authentication Internal API的/start接口，这个调用要标记为HealthTech_PatientRecords数据类别。Internal API计算当前状态后返回StartResponse对象。
好的，已添加Frontend到Internal API的/start请求，以及返回StartResponse的分支。接下来状态机根据start response决定流向，这里需要画一个自循环表示Frontend内部的状态判断吗？
elements_involved: State machine works out where to send user based on start response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，Frontend内部的状态机决策要画出来。然后它会继续调Internal API的/user-exists检查用户是否存在，这次用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer标记，返回CheckUserExistsResponse。
已补充user-exists调用和CheckUserExistsResponse返回。确认用户有账户后，流程进入账户干预检查阶段？我看到有Account Interventions API这个角色。
elements_involved: Validates that the user already has an account

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 没错，Frontend调Internal API的/account-interventions，Internal API再转发到Account Interventions API，这个链路涉及HealthTech_LabAnalyzer和HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault两个数据类别。Account Interventions返回blocked=true的响应。
elements_involved: Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 这里有个细节：Internal API收到blocked响应后，需要生成审计事件，然后才把AccountInterventions对象返回给Frontend对吧？审计事件是内部自循环？
elements_involved: Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 完全正确，Internal API内部生成审计事件，然后把包含blocked干预的AccountInterventions对象返回。Frontend收到后，要阻止用户进行密码重置操作，这里也要画个自循环表示拦截逻辑。
elements_involved: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 稍等，我检查一下——虽然用户被blocked了，但图上还画了/login请求？这不是矛盾吗？
不矛盾，这是实际系统的行为：即使账户被blocked，Frontend仍会尝试/login获取最终的LoginResponse，因为需要完整的响应来决定展示什么页面。这个/login调用标记为HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
理解了，已添加/login调用和LoginResponse返回。最后Frontend展示blocked干预页面，这个作为终态。整个流程从Orchestration的302重定向开始，到显示blocked页面结束，中间经过多层API的账户干预检查。
